description_long: This is a black bottle with a cylindrical body and a yellow screw cap, which is shown detached and floating nearby. The bottle features a prominent yellow and black radioactive warning symbol and the word 'RAD-40' on its label, along with additional cautionary text and hazard stripes. The top of the bottle is stuffed with what appears to be a rag or cloth, giving it the appearance of a Molotov cocktail. The label includes detailed graphics and barcodes, suggesting a manufactured product. The bottle's surface is smooth and glossy, with high-contrast warning graphics that make it visually striking. No visible liquid is present inside, and the bottle appears undamaged.
description: A black bottle with a yellow radioactive warning label, yellow screw cap, and a rag stuffed in the neck, resembling a Molotov cocktail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the radioactive warning symbol, 'RAD-40' label, and the rag protruding from the neck.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the barcode, additional cautionary text, and the yellow cap floating beside the bottle.
description_view_2: Angled view highlighting the warning label and the rag, with the cap further away.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the open neck with the rag and the inside of the yellow cap.
attribute_label_or_branding: Yellow radioactive warning symbol and 'RAD-40' text on a black label, with additional cautionary text, hazard stripes, and a barcode.
